_meta.note: Fire & Blood reconciler output for fab-voyage-of-alyn-oakenfist-23 (smoke=False).

edges.quote: the announcement of the king's betrothal to Myrielle Peake
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon III Targaryen BETROTHED_TO Myrielle Peake

edges.quote: Viserys Targaryen, the king's lost brother
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon III Targaryen SIBLING_OF Viserys Targaryen

edges.quote: married him to his youngest daughter, the Lady Larra Rogare
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Viserys Targaryen SPOUSE_OF Larra Rogare

edges.quote: his youngest daughter, the Lady Larra Rogare
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lysandro Rogare PARENT_OF Larra Rogare

edges.quote: he married him to his youngest daughter
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lysandro Rogare MARRIES_OFF Larra Rogare

edges.quote: he took the king's rejection of his daughter, Myrielle
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Unwin Peake PARENT_OF Myrielle Peake

edges.quote: beheld his daughter, Laena, for the first time
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Alyn Oakenfist PARENT_OF Laena Velaryon

edges.quote: the boy Toron was not yet six
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Dalton Greyjoy PARENT_OF Toron Greyjoy

edges.quote: the Seastone Chair passed to the eldest of his salt sons
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Toron Greyjoy HEIR_TO Dalton Greyjoy

edges.quote: One bore the name of Tess
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Dalton Greyjoy SPOUSE_OF Tess

edges.quote: his uncle Gedmund Peake the Great-Axe
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Gedmund Peake UNCLE_OF Unwin Peake

edges.quote: his aunt the Lady Clarice
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Clarice Osgrey UNCLE_OF Unwin Peake

edges.quote: his bastard brother Ser Mervyn Flowers
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Mervyn Flowers SIBLING_OF Unwin Peake

edges.quote: his nephew Ser Amaury Peake
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Unwin Peake UNCLE_OF Amaury Peake

edges.quote: for a few short years, they made him a king
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Racallio Ryndoon RULES Stepstones

edges.quote: Aliandra Martell, Princess of Dorne
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aliandra Martell RULES Dorne

edges.quote: welcome them to his city
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lyonel Hightower RULES Oldtown

edges.quote: Lady Johanna herself emerged from Casterly Rock
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Johanna Lannister RULES Casterly Rock

edges.quote: the regents might remove Lord Peake as King’s Hand
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Unwin Peake SERVES Aegon III Targaryen

edges.quote: appointed the bluff, honest, and well-regarded Lord Thaddeus Rowan in his place
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Thaddeus Rowan SUCCEEDS Unwin Peake

edges.quote: Twenty war galleys of House Hightower followed, commanded by Ser Leo Costayne
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Leo Costayne SWORN_TO Lyonel Hightower

edges.quote: squired for his lordship as a youth
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Russell Stillman SERVES Alyn Oakenfist

edges.quote: was later knighted by him
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Russell Stillman KNIGHTED_BY Alyn Oakenfist

edges.quote: sailed her into Bloodstone beneath a parley flag
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Alyn Oakenfist NEGOTIATES_WITH Racallio Ryndoon

edges.quote: an alliance writ on parchment and signed in maester's ink
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Alyn Oakenfist CONTRACTED_WITH Racallio Ryndoon

edges.quote: struck up a fast friendship that did much to put all the old enmities
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lyonel Hightower ALLIES_WITH Alyn Oakenfist

edges.quote: making alliance with Tyrosh and Lys against Racallio Ryndoon
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aliandra Martell OPPOSES Racallio Ryndoon

edges.quote: making alliance with Tyrosh and Lys
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aliandra Martell ALLIES_WITH Lys

edges.quote: Tess slipped his dagger from its sheath and opened his throat
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Tess KILLS Dalton Greyjoy

edges.quote: Viserys found himself a captive of the grand admiral of the Triarchy, Sharako Lohar
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Sharako Lohar CAPTURES Viserys Targaryen

edges.quote: forbidden to leave the grounds of Bambarro’s manse
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Bambarro Bazanne IMPRISONS Viserys Targaryen

edges.quote: including the captive princeling, passed into the hands of
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Viserys Targaryen PRISONER_OF Lysandro Rogare

edges.quote: delivering Viserys from his captivity in Lys
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Alyn Oakenfist RESCUES Viserys Targaryen

edges.quote: whispered something in the admiral's ear, a secret
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Drazenko Rogare REVEALS_TO Alyn Oakenfist

edges.quote: These words inflamed Lord Peake's suspicions
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Unwin Peake DISTRUSTS Alyn Oakenfist

edges.quote: throwing himself upon this boy in a fierce embrace
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon III Targaryen LOVES Viserys Targaryen

edges.quote: Bastard Born would have us believe that he provided them
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aliandra Martell LOVER_OF Alyn Oakenfist

edges.quote: “Queen Racallio” (as the Archon had named him)
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Racallio Ryndoon ALIAS_OF Queen Racallio

edges.quote: would become known in the histories of Westeros as Larra of Lys
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Larra Rogare SAME_AS Larra of Lys

edges.quote: the council accepted his resignation with alacrity
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Unwin Peake AGENT_IN Resignation of Unwin Peake as Hand

edges.quote: Bambarro Bazanne died in the Disputed Lands in 132 AC
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Bambarro Bazanne VICTIM_IN Death of Bambarro Bazanne

edges.quote: Prince Viserys had been taken
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Viserys Targaryen VICTIM_IN Capture of Prince Viserys

edges.quote: whispered something in the admiral's ear, a secret
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Drazenko Rogare AGENT_IN Drazenko's secret at Sunspear
